mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_article_chunks (article_id, chunk_index, chunk_text, chunk_summary, embedding_id, created_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkText}, #{chunkSummary}, #{embeddingId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, chunk_index, chunk_text, chunk_summary, embedding_id, created_at FROM knowledge_article_chunks WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, article_id, chunk_index, chunk_text, chunk_summary, embedding_id, created_at FROM knowledge_article_chunks WHERE embedding_id = #{embeddingId} LIMIT 1
